label: Lockheed Martin
info: World's largest defense contractor. Primary F-35 maker. Received $75B in Pentagon contracts in 2020 alone. HIMARS producer for Ukraine. Iron Dome fire-control partner.

label: Boeing (Defense)
info: Supplies JDAM precision bombs and F-15 fighters to Israel. Major Ukraine contractor (ScanEagle drones, tankers). Top-5 Pentagon contractor.

label: RTX (Raytheon)
info: Manufacturer of Iron Dome interceptors, Patriot missiles, ATACMS. Connecticut-based. Massive lobbying presence in DC ($15M/year). Ukraine's key Patriot supplier.

label: Northrop Grumman
info: B-21 Raider bomber. Global security and space defense systems. Lobbied Congress for $116M in FY2024 contracts.

label: General Dynamics
info: M1 Abrams tank, Stryker. 25% revenue surge from Ukraine armor demand in 2023. Gulfstream jet subsidiary.

label: ExxonMobil
info: World's largest publicly-traded oil company. Largest corporate donor to Senate Republicans via PAC and bundled contributions. Top recipient: Ted Cruz ($445k+). Integrated in US Middle East security umbrella.

label: Chevron
info: Global oil giant with deep strategic interest in the Middle East. Top Cornyn donor in TX. BlackRock top shareholder.

label: ConocoPhillips
info: Significant energy lobby player focused on resource security and extraction. Key Oklahoma donor (Lankford, Mullin).

label: BlackRock
info: World's largest asset manager. Top shareholder in ALL major US defense contractors and oil majors. Significant political influence through institutional vote power.

label: Vanguard
info: Major shareholder in the US industrial base including Lockheed Martin, Boeing, ExxonMobil. Significant influence over corporate political spending.

label: State Street
info: Institutional giant. Holdings in aerospace, defense, and Israeli sovereign debt. Third member of the 'Big Three' passive investment giants.
